prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低录取位次分别为约17826名→23389名→18957名→17151名→24825名，整体波动较大，近5年呈现\"升-降-升\"的震荡格局；2025年位次24825 为近5年最高（最靠后），较2024年大幅后移约7674名，反映出当年报考热度有所降温；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021年20人、2022年19人、2023年20人、2 024年20人、2025年23人、2026年23人（据2026年招生计划文件），2026年与2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无直接稀释或加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津医科大 学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第60名，近年排名稳定在55–67区间，是医药类院校中唯一一所211大学，办学层次和学科实力受到广泛认可；近年声誉评价平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第78位（一般热度），短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现异常关注信号，整体报考心理较为稳定），但其临床医学、口腔医学、药学等专业在医学领域具有较强实力，作 为211医科大学对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业社会热度持续偏热（2024年热度指数分别为70.19和72.31），报考意愿稳定；福 建省物理类考生2021年11.7万→2025年19.2万→2026年预计约20.4万（按历史比例估算），考生规模持续增长，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次24825为近5年最高、2026年招生计划持平、福建省物理类考生持续增长（预计+6.1%）等因素，竞争略有加剧；同时2025年位次已处于历史高位，存在一定回归均 值压力。经综合权衡，预测2026年最低录取位次约25025名，区间24525–25525名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）
- 临床医学
- 麻醉学
- 眼视光医学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 生物制药
- 生物信息学
- 医学影像技术
- 医学检验技术
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物医学工程
- 药学类（含药学、药物制剂、临床药学）
- 护理学
- 预防医学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间24525–25525名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如24500名以内）可重点冲刺临床医学（5+3一 体化）和口腔医学（5+3一体化）等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如25500名左右）建议优先考虑护理学、药学类等三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17826 → 23389 → 18957 → 17151 → 24825, showing significant fluctuations and an 'up-down-up' oscillation pattern in the past 5 years; the 2025 ranking of 24825 is the highest (most backward) in the past 5 years, a substantial drop of about 7674 places compared to 2024, reflecting a cooling of application enthusiasm that year; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 20 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 23 in 2025, and 23 in 2026 (according to the 2026 enrollment plan document), with 2026 remaining the same as 2025, no expansion or contraction, thus having no direct dilution or intensification effect on the competition landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 60th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 55–67 range in recent years; it is the only 211 university among medical and pharmaceutical institutions, with its school level and disciplinary strength widely recognized; recent reputation evaluations have been stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 78th (average popularity), short video platform exposure is moderate, no abnormal attention signals, overall application psychology is relatively stable, but its clinical medicine, stomatology, pharmacy and other majors have strong strength in the medical field, as a 211 medical university it has sustained appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine, stomatology and other medical majors have sustained high social popularity (2024 popularity indices were 70.19 and 72.31 respectively), with stable application willingness; the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, and is estimated to be about 204,000 in 2026 (estimated based on historical proportions), with continuous growth in candidate numbers and intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 ranking of 24825 being the highest in the past 5 years, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining unchanged, and the continuous growth of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province (estimated +6.1%), competition has slightly intensified; at the same time, the 2025 ranking is already at a historical high, with some pressure to revert to the mean. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 25025, with a range of 24525–25525.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Clinical Medicine
- Anesthesiology
- Ophthalmology and Optometry Medicine
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Biopharmaceuticals
- Bioinformatics
- Medical Imaging Technology
- Medical Laboratory Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Biomedical Engineering
- Pharmacy (including Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Clinical Pharmacy)
- Nursing
- Preventive Medicine
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 24525–25525, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 24500), you can focus on sprinting for top majors like Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program); if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 25500), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Nursing and Pharmacy to ensure admission.
